item.description: President Donald Trump said he only plans to make a good deal with Iran, or not make a deal at all, as Iranian state media released a draft of what they said was an alleged peace deal outline. NBC News’ Monica Alba reports that the White House called the released memorandum a “fabrication.”

media:content.media:title: Trump: Iran is ‘negotiating on fumes’ as deal remains unclear
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said he only plans to make a good deal with Iran, or not make a deal at all, as Iranian state media released a draft of what they said was an alleged peace deal outline. NBC News’ Monica Alba reports that the White House called the released memorandum a “fabrication.”

item.title: Trump: Iran is ‘negotiating on fumes’ as deal remains unclear

item.dc:creator: Justin Goldman
Laura Strickler
item.description: President Donald Trump’s social posts left a trail of confusion over the weekend as Iran negotiations continue.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Hosts Law Enforcement Leaders Dinner In The Rose Garden
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump in the Rose Garden at the White House on May 11.

item.title: Deal or no deal? Trump’s social media posts add confusion to Iran conflict

item.description: Kenneth Iwamasa, Matthew Perry's former assistant, was sentenced to 41 months after pleading guilty to conspiracy to distribute ketamine resulting in death. NBC News' Chloe Melas and Misty Marris report.

media:content.media:title: Matthew Perry's former assistant sentenced to 41 months in actor's overdose death
media:content.media:description: Kenneth Iwamasa, Matthew Perry's former assistant, was sentenced to 41 months after pleading guilty to conspiracy to distribute ketamine resulting in death. NBC News' Chloe Melas and Misty Marris report.

item.title: Matthew Perry's former assistant sentenced to 41 months in actor's overdose death

item.dc:creator: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
Monica Alba
item.description: The Trump administration is preparing a quarantine facility in Kenya for Americans who have been exposed to Ebola amid the escalating outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, an administration official said Wednesday

media:content.media:text: People wearing neon green vests load World Health Organization boxes onto a plane outside
media:content.media:description: Ground crew load medical supplies onto a United Nations Humanitarian Air Service operated charter plane bound for Bunia, Democratic Republic of Congo, as the World Health Organization coordinates delivery in response to an Ebola outbreak, at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport in Nairobi, Kenya, on May 20, 2026.

item.title: U.S. plans to send Americans exposed to Ebola to facility in Kenya

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: Micron Technologies and SK Hynix joined the trillion-dollar club, which includes Apple, Meta and Tesla.

media:content.media:text: Micron hq.
media:content.media:description: The Micron Technology Inc. headquarters in Boise, Idaho, in 2024.

item.title: Red hot AI demand pushes more companies into the $1 trillion club

item.dc:creator: Jonathan Allen
item.description: AI is becoming a dominant political issue, with many on the right and the left coalescing around concerns about the rapid growth of the industry.

media:content.media:text: Governor Newsom speaks while pointing his finger upwards
media:content.media:description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom recently signed an executive order requiring state agencies to work with industry groups, academics and organized labor to develop plans for assessing and offsetting AI’s effects on workers in the state.

media:content.media:text: President Trump's Nominees For The Federal Trade Commission Testify Before The Senate Commerce Committee
media:content.media:description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom recently signed an executive order requiring state agencies to work with industry groups, academics and organized labor to develop plans for assessing and offsetting AI’s effects on workers in the state.

item.title: Gavin Newsom takes a populist turn on AI ahead of a possible 2028 presidential run

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Vance said in an interview with NBC News he is glad the pope tackled AI. He also discussed why X remains off his phone after he deleted it for Lent.

media:content.media:text: JD Vance speaks
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance's new book, "Communion," is set to be released June 16.

item.title: Vance calls Pope Leo’s AI warnings ‘profound’

item.description: As cases continue to rise, a blood test has been added to the list of the American Cancer Society’s recommended screenings for colorectal cancer. It’s not meant to replace colonoscopies, but could help catch cancers when people might not get screened otherwise. NBC News' Erika Edwards reports on how effective the blood test is.

media:content.media:title: New blood test is added an an option for colorectal cancer screenings
media:content.media:description: As cases continue to rise, a blood test has been added to the list of the American Cancer Society’s recommended screenings for colorectal cancer. It’s not meant to replace colonoscopies, but could help catch cancers when people might not get screened otherwise. NBC News' Erika Edwards reports on how effective the blood test is.

item.title: New blood test is added an an option for colorectal cancer screenings

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
Tim Stelloh
item.description: The death of a Southern California man who was attacked outside his home decorated with Donald Trump memorabilia has left his family struggling to cope.

media:content.media:text: Kerry Sheron, right, a Southern California man known for his patriotic and pro-Trump home decorations died after he was assaulted outside his house, authorities said.
media:content.media:description: Kerry Sheron, right, a Southern California man known for his patriotic and pro-Trump home decorations died after he was assaulted outside his house, authorities said.

item.title: Man known for pro-Trump displays who died after attack outside his home was ‘caring’ and ‘kind,’ family says

item.dc:creator: Dareh Gregorian
item.description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday went on another tirade against Somali immigrants, declaring during his Cabinet meeting that “they’re all crooks.”“The Somalians, what they’ve done to Minnesota, the Somalians, crooked as hell.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump speaks during a Cabinet meeting at the White House on May 27, 2026.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump disparaged Somali immigrants during a Cabinet meeting on Wednesday.

item.title: Trump again disparages Somali immigrants: ‘They’re all crooks’

item.dc:creator: Bridget Bowman
item.description: President Donald Trump went on a winning streak in May primaries as he ousted several Republicans who had dissented from his party line, further tightening his grip on the GOP.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Visits A Packaging Facility In Kentucky
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump (L) shakes hands with Republican congressional candidate for Kentucky, Ed Gallrein as they speak on stage at Verst Logistics on March 11, 2026 in Hebron, Kentucky.

item.title: Trump racks up May primary wins in Republican retribution campaign

item.dc:creator: Ryan Chandler
Rebecca Shabad
item.description: Texas state Rep. James Talarico said Wednesday that previous comments he’s made on sensitive cultural issues “missed the mark,” as Republicans lean on those remarks to attack him in the contentious Senate race.

media:content.media:text: State Representative James Talarico standing next to Texas' flag
media:content.media:description: State Representative James Talarico in Houston on March 2.

item.title: James Talarico says he ‘missed the mark’ on ‘cringey’ comments as Texas general election starts

item.dc:creator: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
Monica Alba
item.description: The Trump administration is preparing a quarantine facility in Kenya for Americans who have been exposed to Ebola amid the escalating outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, an administration official said Wednesday

media:content.media:text: People wearing neon green vests load World Health Organization boxes onto a plane outside
media:content.media:description: Ground crew load medical supplies onto a United Nations Humanitarian Air Service operated charter plane bound for Bunia, Democratic Republic of Congo, as the World Health Organization coordinates delivery in response to an Ebola outbreak, at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport in Nairobi, Kenya, on May 20, 2026.

item.title: U.S. plans to send Americans exposed to Ebola to facility in Kenya

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Tim Rohan
item.description: Forget the MVP finalists Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and Victor Wembanyama.

media:content.media:text: Jared McCain.
media:content.media:description: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Jared McCain reacts after a basket during the fourth quarter against the San Antonio Spurs in game five of the western conference finals for the 2026 NBA playoffs at Paycom Center.

media:content.media:text: Victor Wembanyama.
media:content.media:description: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Jared McCain reacts after a basket during the fourth quarter against the San Antonio Spurs in game five of the western conference finals for the 2026 NBA playoffs at Paycom Center.

media:content.media:text: Jude Bellingham.
media:content.media:description: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Jared McCain reacts after a basket during the fourth quarter against the San Antonio Spurs in game five of the western conference finals for the 2026 NBA playoffs at Paycom Center.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: The Thunder’s role players are playing like stars in West finals

item.dc:creator: Katie Wall
Corky Siemaszko
item.description: \Matthew Perry’s former personal assistant was sentenced Wednesday to three years and five months in federal prison for giving the “Friends” star the ketamine injections that left the actor dead of an overdose in a hot tub back in 2023.

media:content.media:text: A split composite of Matthew Perry and Kenneth Iwamasa.
media:content.media:description: Matthew Perry; Kenneth Iwamasa.

item.title: Matthew Perry’s assistant sentenced to more than three years in actor’s fatal overdose

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: The musical lineup for a “World Fair-style celebration” on the National Mall marking America’s 250th birthday will include hip-hop acts Vanilla Ice and Flo Rida.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of Flo Rida, left, and Vanilla Ice as they perform on different stages
media:content.media:description: Rappers Flo Rida, left, and Vanilla Ice.

item.title: Stop, celebrate and listen: Vanilla Ice and Flo Rida booked for America250 bash

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: Micron Technologies and SK Hynix joined the trillion-dollar club, which includes Apple, Meta and Tesla.

media:content.media:text: Micron hq.
media:content.media:description: The Micron Technology Inc. headquarters in Boise, Idaho, in 2024.

item.title: Red hot AI demand pushes more companies into the $1 trillion club

item.dc:creator: Megan Lebowitz
item.description: President Donald Trump said he thinks he will attend an NBA Finals game after the New York Knicks advanced to the finals for the first time in 27 years.“They have some great players,” Trump told reporters during the White House cabinet meeting on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: New York Knicks center Karl-Anthony Towns and guard Jose Alvarado help the team lift the trophy.
media:content.media:description: New York Knicks center Karl-Anthony Towns and guard Jose Alvarado help the team lift the trophy after defeating the Cleveland Cavaliers in game four of the eastern conference finals for the 2026 NBA playoffs at Rocket Arena.

item.title: Trump says he may attend Knicks’ NBA Finals game in New York

item.dc:creator: Jonathan Allen
item.description: AI is becoming a dominant political issue, with many on the right and the left coalescing around concerns about the rapid growth of the industry.

media:content.media:text: Governor Newsom speaks while pointing his finger upwards
media:content.media:description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom recently signed an executive order requiring state agencies to work with industry groups, academics and organized labor to develop plans for assessing and offsetting AI’s effects on workers in the state.

media:content.media:text: President Trump's Nominees For The Federal Trade Commission Testify Before The Senate Commerce Committee
media:content.media:description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom recently signed an executive order requiring state agencies to work with industry groups, academics and organized labor to develop plans for assessing and offsetting AI’s effects on workers in the state.

item.title: Gavin Newsom takes a populist turn on AI ahead of a possible 2028 presidential run

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: CBS has reportedly declined to renew a contract with Sharyn Alfonsi, a “60 Minutes” journalist whose segment about an El Salvadoran prison was abruptly nixed.

media:content.media:text: 60 Minutes correspondent Sharyn Alfonsi at a conference in 2022.
media:content.media:description: "60 Minutes" correspondent Sharyn Alfonsi at a conference in 2022.

media:content.media:text: Bari Weiss
media:content.media:description: "60 Minutes" correspondent Sharyn Alfonsi at a conference in 2022.

item.title: ‘60 Minutes’ journalist says CBS contract ended after furor over delayed segment

item.dc:creator: Erika Angulo
Matt Lavietes
David K. Li
item.description: MIAMI — A federal judge on Wednesday declined to jail a Florida teenager accused of killing and sexually assaulting his stepsister, allowing him to remain in the custody of a family member while he awaits trial

media:content.media:text: Cruise Industry Helps Tourism To Be Back On Track In Portugal With Record Visits To The Country
media:content.media:description: A Carnival cruise ship

media:content.media:text: Anna Kepner takes a selfie in a mirror
media:content.media:description: Anna Kepner.

media:content.media:text: A white sedan, covered in mylar balloons and flower bouquets, at sunset.
media:content.media:description: Anna Kepner's car, decorated by her classmates at Temple Christian School, remained in the school parking lot in Titusville, Fla., for weeks after her death.

item.title: Judge declines to jail teenager accused of killing stepsister aboard cruise ship

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: A South Carolina woman dining at a restaurant with her husband was killed Friday night after she was struck in the head and neck by a flying patio umbrella.

media:content.media:text: Driftwood Grill Home of the Lazy Gator in Summerton, S.C.
media:content.media:description: Driftwood Grill Home of the Lazy Gator in Summerton, S.C.

item.title: Woman killed by flying patio umbrella while dining at South Carolina restaurant

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
Cory Fernandez
Bethany Heitman
item.description: I found the best methods and products for cleaning glasses, including reading glasses, sunglasses and more. Optometrists recommend the best cleaning products.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

item.title: This is how you should actually be cleaning your glasses

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Podiatrists say that Birkenstock Arizona sandals are some of the most comfortable shoes on the market thanks to the built-in arch support. Right now, get them for 40 percent off.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

item.title: Deal of the Day: Birkenstock Arizona sandals are 40% off
